data_description.base_url: The base URL for the nicodAImus API. Only change this if you use a custom endpoint.

user.description: Set up nicodAImus by providing your API key. You can get your API key from your [nicodAImus account]({instructions_url}).

reauth_confirm.description: Your API key is no longer valid. Please enter your updated nicodAImus API key.

data_description.base_url: The base URL for the nicodAImus API. Only change this if you use a custom endpoint.

reconfigure.description: Update the nicodAImus API base URL.

abort.entry_not_loaded: Cannot add things while the configuration is disabled.

data_description.prompt: Instruct how the LLM should respond. This can be a template.

data.max_tokens: Maximum tokens to return in response

data_description.chat_model: The model to use for conversations. Use 'auto' for automatic selection.
data_description.max_tokens: The maximum number of tokens the model can generate in a response.
data_description.temperature: Controls randomness. Lower values make responses more focused and deterministic.
